daily_summary.headline: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight and Aurora Opportunities

top_events.title: Soyuz-5 Demo Flight
top_events.description: The Soyuz-5 rocket is set for its demo flight, marking a significant step in Russian space capabilities.

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Starlink Launch
top_events.description: SpaceX continues its Starlink deployment with another batch of satellites.
top_events.action: Tune in to the live webcast.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 level geomagnetic storm may provide aurora viewing opportunities at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check local conditions for possible sightings.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
